ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary contact person for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department receiving the budget */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the budget is allocated */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount of money allocated to the department */,
  "source_document" INTEGER /* URL to the source document detailing the budget */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., 'approved', 'pending', 'rejected') */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the budget */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the budget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_source_document FOREIGN KEY ("source_document") REFERENCES budget_documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget from which the expenditure is made */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the expenditure */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure was approved */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the expenditure */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor or supplier */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., 'check', 'credit card') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expenditure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expenditure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'department head', 'financial analyst', 'admin') */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget document */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL where the budget document is hosted */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document's content */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document file (e.g., 'pdf', 'docx') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)
